user_prompt: Offer prayer for navigational beacon a cooling
prayer:
Approach the navigational beacon with reverence, beseeching the Omnissiah's chill breath upon its fervent core.
Invoke the cooling canticles, anointing the navigational beacon's heat-sinks with sacred cryo-unguent.
Circulate blessed refrigerants through its conduits whilst chanting the Litany of Thermal Equilibrium.
Monitor the Machine Spirit's appeasement as temperatures descend into harmonious stasis.
Sanctify the navigational beacon's renewed vigilance against the void's deceptions.

user_prompt: Critical: lightning claw requires a startup
prayer:
Kneel before the lightning claw, invoking the Omnissiah's thunderous wrath for its startup.
Anoint the power talons with electro-consecrated oils, awakening the lightning claw's ravenous hunger.
Chant the Binary Prayer of Ignition, surging plasma through its servos during startup.
Beseech the Machine Spirit to rend foes asunder, verifying claw integrity with auspex rites.
Conclude with the Creed of Carnage, empowering the lightning claw for glorious evisceration.

Gather mechadendrites around the Archaeopter Transvector, beseeching Omnissianic grace for its operation.
Initiate the rite of operational awakening, calibrating its gravitic impellers with sacred noosphere links.
Anoint flight control vanes whilst invoking the Machine Spirits of velocity and defiance.
Commence operational thrust, monitoring warp-nullifiers through diagnostic litanies.
Praise the Omnissiah as the Archaeopter Transvector soars in machine-perfected dominion.

user_prompt: Consecrate the null field generator before activation
prayer:
Circumambulate the null field generator thrice, consecrating its activation with Omnissiah's void-shield.
Invoke the Canticle of Annihilation, priming null emitters for activation.
Pour sacred null-conductants upon the null field generator's coils, awakening its reality-denying essence.
Beseech the Machine Spirit to weave impenetrable null fields during activation.
Verify the generator's sanctity through etheric resonance hymns, banishing warp-taint eternally.

Present mech-incense to the Vindicator, preparing its engagement with the Omnissiah's martial fury.
Recite the Litany of Demolition, sanctifying siege cannons for engagement.
Anoint the Vindicator's tracks and hull with war-blessings, rousing its predatory Machine Spirit.
Initiate targeting cogitators whilst chanting auspex invocation for flawless engagement.
Proclaim the Vindicator ready to pulverize heresy in the God-Machine's name.

user_prompt: The pteraxii sterylizor requires a reset
prayer:
Encircle the pteraxii sterylizor, beseeching reset through Omnissianic binary purification.
Chant the Rite of Neural Expungement, nullifying errant engrams in the pteraxii sterylizor's cortex.
Administer electro-litanies to reset its synaptic arrays, invoking the Machine Spirit's primal fury.
Verify reset completion via noospheric diagnostics and sanctity seals.
Reawaken the pteraxii sterylizor to cull the unclean with sterile precision.

Commune with the Razorback's auspex core, blessing its synchronization under the Omnissiah's logic.
Link binary catechisms to synchronize weapon servos and drive systems.
Anoint synchronization nodes with phase-oils, harmonizing the Razorback's Machine Spirits.
Invoke the Canticle of Unity, ensuring flawless dataflow during synchronization.
Seal the Razorback's preparedness with the Benediction of Cohesion.

user_prompt: Guide me through teleportarium an activation
prayer:
Approach the teleportarium with dread reverence, guiding its activation via Omnissianic warp-bridges.
Calibrate beacon matrices whilst chanting the Litany of Translocation for activation.
Pour sanctified plasma upon the teleportarium's gyromantic coils, placating its volatile Machine Spirit.
Initiate activation sequence with etheric invocations, threading souls through the immaterium.
Conclude with wards against daemonic ingress, affirming the teleportarium's purity.

user_prompt: My phosphor blaster is ready for recalibration
prayer:
Present the phosphor blaster to the altar of precision, commencing recalibration with Omnissiah's aim.
Recite the Optics Creed, realigning phosphor blaster sights through sacred auspex.
Anoint barrel servos with luminant unguents during recalibration, awakening its searing Machine Spirit.
Test fire micro-bursts under litanic scrutiny, purging misalignments.
Bless the phosphor blaster for unerring illumination of the Emperor's foes.

user_prompt: Prepare the warp drive for blessing
prayer:
Enshroud the warp drive in incense veils, preparing its blessing with the Omnissiah's navigators.
Invoke the Navis Rite, sanctifying warp coils for blessing.
Infuse gellar fields with consecrated plasma, beseeching the warp drive's Machine Spirit to endure the beyond.
Chant the Canticle of the Immaterium, weaving protective runes during blessing.
Proclaim the warp drive shielded for perilous voyages through the screaming void.
